examples: The rarest of the rare are these shots: a mother, in her den, cradling her newborn panda baby.
And then he sees her-sitting on the curb, cradling her head in her arms, going boo hoo.
The first home was made when a woman, cradling in her loving arms a baby, crooned a lullaby.
The mothers of the girls sat next to each other in court cradling old teddy bears.
Every one of the tiny round tables is filled with people cradling small plates of their favourite variety.
